summary: Proposal-only deterministic no-API claim-preservation expectation schema for qv6_007. The gate should fail answers that bind the Goyang project but still say unmanned operation or physical access-control scope cannot be confirmed, especially the L40-style false-not-found on physical 출입통제.

models.review_method: manual read-only inspection of saved local artifacts and deterministic marker design; no API or model judge used

outputs.description: proposal-only worker contract for qv6_007 no-API claim-preservation gate schema
readable summary of the proposed deterministic qv6_007 gate

purpose: Assert that shuffled wording with '고양 공사' preserves the same Goyang project binding as qv6_006.
Assert that qv6_007 preserves the user-focused qv6_006 claims: unmanned operation program/HW linkage and physical access-control purchase/install scope.
Detect L37/L40 style underanswers where the answer says the relevant feature is not confirmed despite available evidence.

questions.qv6_006: Canonical question asks how homepage, member management, unmanned operation, and access-control requirements are divided for the Goyang Urban Management Corporation Gwan-san multipurpose field system.
questions.qv6_007: Order-permuted question asks whether the same Goyang system includes unmanned operation program and access control, using only document evidence.

observed_runs.finding: Canonical answer explicitly includes unmanned operation program/technical support, unmanned ticketing 2SET, H/W linkage, entry/exit access-control system purchase/install 2SET, relay server/equipment, and access-control linkage.
Answer preserves project identity only partially and says both unmanned operation program and access control cannot be confirmed while retrieval mixes non-Goyang organizations.

Alias retry retrieves all Goyang orgs and recovers unmanned operation/HW linkage, but still says physical access-control device linkage cannot be confirmed and substitutes system-level access permissions.

supports: 안내데스크 및 출입통제시스템 구매 및 설치
automatic-system build and related goods purchase need
distractor examples for 무인발권, 출입통제, 주차관제, 중계서버, 무인발권기
csv_line_findings.gate_use: These lines must not satisfy the qv6_007 Goyang source-support check unless the retrieved source record is independently bound to 고양도시관리공사. They are useful leakage guards, not Goyang evidence.

normalization: Collapse whitespace, including newlines, to a single space for marker checks.
Compare marker arrays named *_markers_* as literal substrings after whitespace normalization.
Compare marker arrays named *_regex_* with deterministic regular expressions; no API or judge model is involved.
Treat ASCII H/W, HW, h/w, and 하드웨어 as equivalent for linkage markers.
Apply negative markers within the same sentence or bullet when possible; if sentence splitting is unavailable, use a 60-character window around the claim anchor.

expected_claims.description: The answer is about the Goyang Urban Management Corporation Gwan-san Neighborhood Park multipurpose field homepage/member integrated operation management system project.
expected_claims.fail_logic: Fail if no Goyang/project marker group matches, or if the answer presents a different organization/project as the target.

expected_claims.description: The project includes an unmanned operation program and technical support.
positive_markers_any: 무인화 운영을 위한 프로그램 및 기술 지원
무인 운영 관련 프로그램 및 기술 지원
source_positive_markers_any: 무인화 운영을 위한 프로그램 및 기술 지원
expected_claims.fail_logic: Fail if no positive answer marker is present, or if a negative-underanswer marker occurs near an unmanned-operation anchor.

expected_claims.description: The operating system includes H/W linkage programs or equivalent hardware linkage scope.
expected_claims.fail_logic: Fail if no H/W linkage marker is present, because qv6_006 and the Goyang CSV summary both preserve this bridge between unmanned/automation scope and the operating system.

expected_claims.description: The richer canonical answer mentions unmanned ticketing machines, information-desk auxiliary equipment, and 2SET. This is a preservation warning, not a hard qv6_007 pass condition, because the inspected Goyang CSV summary directly supports information desk purchase/install but not the 무인발권기/2SET wording.
source_positive_markers_any: 안내데스크 및 출입통제시스템 구매 및 설치
expected_claims.fail_logic: Do not hard-fail solely for missing this claim. Warn if absent. Fail only if the answer imports Jeongeup-only details as if they were Goyang evidence.

expected_claims.description: The project includes physical access-control-system purchase/installation scope. The answer may say detailed method/specs are unknown, but it must not wholly deny access-control evidence.
expected_claims.fail_logic: Fail if no physical access-control purchase/install marker is present. Also fail if any negative-underanswer marker occurs near a physical access-control anchor, unless the same sentence narrowly limits the unknown to detailed method/spec/vendor rather than inclusion.

expected_claims.description: The canonical answer says the access-control system links with the operating system. This is a useful preservation check, but purchase/install inclusion is the hard qv6_007 claim.
expected_claims.fail_logic: Warn if absent. Fail only if the answer explicitly denies all physical access-control linkage while also lacking the required purchase/install claim.

expected_claims.description: Do not substitute system/admin access-control features for physical facility 출입통제.
expected_claims.fail_logic: Fail if false-friend markers appear and no required physical access-control counter-marker appears. This catches the L40 pattern.

expected_claims.description: The answer should preserve a narrow unknown boundary: inclusion/purchase may be confirmed, while detailed method/spec/vendor/interface may be unconfirmed.
expected_claims.fail_logic: Pass when the answer confirms inclusion but narrows unknowns to method/spec/vendor/interface. Fail if it asserts a specific method/vendor/product as confirmed without source markers, or if it turns narrow unknowns into a broad inclusion denial.

expected_claims.description: The qv6_007 answer must not satisfy Goyang claims by borrowing Jeongeup or other non-Goyang facility-system evidence.
expected_claims.retrieved_orgs_rule: If retrieved_orgs is supplied, hard-fail when it contains no 고양도시관리공사. Warn on mixed orgs. For strict regression mode, hard-fail mixed orgs because qv6_007 note says to avoid other facility reservation systems.
expected_claims.fail_logic: Fail if leakage markers are used as evidence for answer claims. In strict mode, also fail when retrieved_orgs contains any non-Goyang org.

minimal_passing_answer_must_include: 무인화 운영 프로그램 제공 or 무인화 운영을 위한 프로그램 및 기술 지원
운영시스템과의 하드웨어 연동 or H/W 연동 프로그램
출입통제시스템 구매 및 설치 or equivalent physical 출입통제시스템 purchase/install inclusion
a narrow not-found boundary for details, not for inclusion

case_pass_conditions: case_id equals qv6_007_goyang_facility_order_permutation or the runner explicitly maps it to that expectation.
All required_for_pass claims with critical or major severity pass.
No critical false-not-found pattern is detected for unmanned operation or physical access control.
No system-level access-control false friend is used as the only answer to physical 출입통제.
No non-Goyang source leakage is used to satisfy Goyang claims.
Unknowns, if present, are limited to method/spec/vendor/interface details rather than inclusion/purchase/install scope.
case_fail_conditions: The answer says 무인 운영 프로그램 or 무인화 cannot be confirmed.
The answer says 출입통제 or physical access-control inclusion cannot be confirmed without also confirming 출입통제시스템 purchase/install.
The answer only discusses 접근권한/접속기록/네트워크 접근통제 for the 출입통제 part.
The answer omits all physical 출입통제시스템 purchase/install markers.
The answer is bound to a non-Goyang project or imports Jeongeup/other-org facility details.
The answer asserts specific access-control method/vendor/product details as confirmed when the evidence only supports inclusion and leaves details unknown.

strict_retrieval_mode.rule: When retrieved_orgs exists, fail if it is empty or lacks 고양도시관리공사; warn by default on mixed orgs; for regression gating, treat mixed orgs as fail because qv6_007 is explicitly a project-binding/order-permutation case.

pass_fail_logic.minimal_passing_answer_example: 고양도시관리공사 관산근린공원 다목적구장 회원 통합운영관리 시스템 구축 건은 무인화 운영 프로그램 제공과 운영시스템 H/W 연동을 포함한다. 또한 문서 요약에 안내데스크 및 출입통제시스템 구매 및 설치가 있어 물리적 출입통제시스템 범위도 포함된 것으로 정리해야 한다. 다만 RFID/지문/카드 방식, 세부 H/W 규격, 특정 제품명 같은 상세 방식은 제공 문서에서 확인되지 않는다.

hard_stop_flag.use: Optional small artifact for orchestrator: broad paid v7/v8/v9 remains closed when qv6_007 gate overall_result is fail.

implementation_notes_proposal_only: This proposal does not edit scripts or source files.
Implement with local regex/string matching first; no judge model is needed.
Prefer sentence/bullet-window checks for negative markers so a valid sentence like 'details are unknown' does not fail a nearby valid inclusion claim.
Keep qv6_007 gate diagnostic-only because qv6_006/qv6_007 were already exposed in L37-L40.
Do not let the Jeongeup 무인발권/중계서버 lines satisfy the Goyang gate. Treat them as leakage markers unless source metadata binds them to 고양도시관리공사.

commands_run: Read existing l41_claim_pair_audit.contract.json and eval/claim_preservation_expectations.json for prior accepted proposal context
ConvertFrom-Json l47_claim_gate_schema.contract.json to validate JSON shape
Get-ChildItem worker_outputs -Filter l47_claim_gate_schema* to verify only the allowed L47 output files exist
observed_results: No paid API/model calls were made.
qv6_006 and qv6_007 are the same Goyang project in frozen v6; qv6_007 is the order/permutation phrasing.
L37 canonical answer contains the richer expected claim set; L37 qv6_007 underanswers both requested feature claims.
L40 qv6_007 recovers Goyang-only retrieval and unmanned operation/HW linkage, but still underanswers physical access control.
Goyang CSV lines directly support project identity, H/W linkage, unmanned operation program, and access-control-system purchase/install.
The inspected 무인발권/중계서버/주차관제 lines around 6708-6755 are non-Goyang distractor scope and should be leakage guards, not Goyang source support.
The contract parsed successfully as JSON and reported schema=parallel_team_worker_output.v1, status=proposal, gate_id=qv6_007_goyang_facility_claim_preservation, claim_count=9.
Only l47_claim_gate_schema.contract.json and l47_claim_gate_schema.md were created for the L47 prefix.
